source.description: Годишен доклад за дейността на ИА ГИТ — national, annual, PDF. Inspections, violations found (incl. wage-related), undeclared-work checks. Curated + verified from the report PDFs. The inspectorate (EIK 831545394) is the `inspection` universe of the social group; this is its outcome tile, paired with its ~€10M procurement.

reports.2024: https://www.gli.government.bg/sites/default/files/upload/documents/2025-04/Доклад за дейността на ИА ГИТ през 2024 г..pdf
reports.2025: https://www.gli.government.bg/sites/default/files/upload/documents/2026-04/Доклад за дейността на ИА ГИТ през 2025 г.pdf
